tree.name: De'Andre Hunter
tree.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: SAC sent Keon Ellis and Dennis Schroder to CLE; SAC sent Dario Saric and a 2029 2nd round pick to CHI; CHI sent Emanuel Miller to CLE; CLE sent a 2027 2nd round pick to CHI; CLE sent De'Andre Hunter to SAC
tree.note: Forward originally drafted 4th overall by Atlanta in 2019

assetsGivenUp.name: Keon Ellis
assetsGivenUp.note: Undrafted guard signed to two-way contract, later converted to regular contract Feb 2024

assetsGivenUp.name: Dennis Schroder
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Kings traded a 2026 2nd round pick (CHO own) to Pistons for Dennis Schroder and a 2029 2nd round pick (least favorable). Detroit also received a trade exception.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2026 2nd Round Pick via CHO
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Received from Spurs in the De'Aaron Fox 3-team trade. Originally a conditional 2025 1st round pick (CHO own) that did not convey, became 2026 and 2027 2nd round picks.
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired in Fox trade, CHO own. Shared cost with Zach LaVine trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: De'Aaron Fox
assetsGivenUp.note: Guard drafted 5th overall from Kentucky. Shared cost — also produced Zach LaVine.

assetsGivenUp.name: Dario Saric
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Kings traded Jonas Valanciunas to Nuggets for Dario Saric. Both teams received trade exceptions.

assetsGivenUp.name: Jonas Valanciunas
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Kings traded Sidy Cissoko, a 2028 2nd round pick (DEN own), and a 2029 2nd round pick (SAC own) to Wizards for Jonas Valanciunas. Both teams received trade exceptions.

assetsGivenUp.name: Sidy Cissoko
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Received from Spurs in the De'Aaron Fox 3-team trade (Fox and McLaughlin to SAS; Huerter to CHI; LaVine to SAC; Cissoko and picks to SAC)
assetsGivenUp.note: Wing drafted #44 overall by SAS in 2023. Shared cost with Zach LaVine trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: De'Aaron Fox
assetsGivenUp.note: Guard drafted 5th overall from Kentucky. Shared cost — also produced Zach LaVine.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2028 2nd Round Pick via DEN
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Received from Spurs in the De'Aaron Fox 3-team trade
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired in Fox trade, DEN own. Shared cost with Zach LaVine trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: De'Aaron Fox
assetsGivenUp.note: Guard drafted 5th overall from Kentucky. Shared cost — also produced Zach LaVine.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2029 2nd Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Received from Pistons in the Schroder trade (least favorable of available 2029 2nds), then sent to CHI in Hunter deal
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from DET in Schroder trade. Cost shared with Schroder acquisition.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2026 2nd Round Pick via CHO
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Received from Spurs in the De'Aaron Fox 3-team trade. Originally a conditional 2025 1st round pick (CHO own) that did not convey, became 2026 and 2027 2nd round picks.
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired in Fox trade, CHO own. Sent to DET in Schroder trade. Shared cost with Zach LaVine trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: De'Aaron Fox
assetsGivenUp.note: Guard drafted 5th overall from Kentucky. Shared cost — also produced Zach LaVine.
